basic_details.job_title: NIFT Resource Centre Trainees Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Fashion Technology (NIFT) Resource Centre Trainees Notification 2026 has been released under Advt. No. 7013(0101)/NIFT-CHN/RC/2025 on the official website https://www.nift.ac.in/. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the NIFT Resource Centre Trainees Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate degree in Library and Information Science or equivalent
qualification.details: Postgraduate degree in Library and Information Science or equivalent from a recognized university/Institute in India. Working knowledge of library software and institutional repository software is desirable. Fresh Graduates can apply. Candidates having prior working experience in libraries/information centres will be given preference.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NIFT Resource Centre Trainees Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 03-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIFT to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIFT Resource Centre Trainees Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the NIFT Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download NIFT Resource Centre Trainees Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NIFT Resource Centre Trainees Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
NIFT Resource Centre Trainees Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Postgraduate degree in Library and Information Science or equivalent from a recognized university/Institute in India. Working knowledge of library software and institutional repository software is desirable. Fresh Graduates can apply. Candidates having prior working experience in libraries/information centres will be given preference.

content_sections.heading: NIFT Resource Centre Trainees Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

content_sections.heading: NIFT Resource Centre Trainees Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
NIFT Resource Centre Trainees Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
NIFT Resource Centre Trainees Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NIFT Resource Centre Trainees Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 03-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIFT to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIFT Resource Centre Trainees Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NIFT Resource Centre Trainees Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the NIFT Resource Centre Trainees positions is 03 July 2026. Ensure you submit your application well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Postgraduate degree in Library and Information Science or an equivalent qualification from a recognized university or institute in India to be eligible for this role.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Resource Centre Trainee position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applicants is 28 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per the prevailing government norms and regulations.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Resource Centre Trainee role?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a consolidated stipend of Rs. 25,000/- per month for the duration of their temporary engagement.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for Resource Centre Trainees?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the post of Resource Centre Trainee announced by NIFT Chennai in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for NIFT Resource Centre Trainees?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a skill test followed by a personal interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in these stages.

faq.question: Q7. Is prior experience required for this position?
faq.answer: Fresh graduates are eligible to apply. However, candidates with prior working experience in libraries or information centers will be given preference during the selection process.

faq.question: Q8. What is the nature of the job?
faq.answer: The Resource Centre Trainee positions are temporary in nature, with the engagement typically for a period of one year.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification and the online application link in the "Important Links" section of this article. The official website is also provided.

faq.question: Q10. What is the location of the NIFT center for this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the National Institute of Fashion Technology (NIFT) Chennai, located in Tamil Nadu.
